leadText: Shadow Half (Japanese: ダークハーフ Dark Half) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Half deals damage equal to 50% of each Pokémon's current HP , rounded down, to all Pokémon in battle, including the user. It cannot cause fainting . The user is forced to recharge during the next turn. Shadow Half cannot be used if the user is under the effect of Taunt . Damage dealt by Shadow Half is counted as an attack for the purpose of Bide , Mirror Coat (but not Counter ), and Focus Punch . As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Half cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura's energy cuts everyone's HP by half.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Half is the only damaging move that targets all Pokémon on the field, including the user.
